# Madison County Roofing & Home Improvements

> Family-owned roofing contractor in Collinsville, Illinois. Serving Madison County and the Metro East since 1937. Residential roofing, commercial roofing, storm damage repair, siding, gutters, and home improvements.

Madison County Roofing & Home Improvements, Inc. has been roofing homes and businesses in Madison County, Illinois since 1937. The company is owned and operated by Mark Eck, who personally inspects every job. Every crew member has been with the company ten years or more.

The business is located at 5 Harmin Ln, Collinsville, IL 62234. Phone: (618) 876-4309. Hours: Monday through Friday, 8:00am to 4:30pm. Payment accepted: cash and check only. Free in-person estimates are provided on every job.

Madison County Roofing is a CertainTeed ShingleMaster, holds the CertainTeed Master Shingle Applicator certification, is an Owens Corning Preferred Contractor, and is a certified GacoRoof applicator. The company is a member of the National Roofing Contractors Association (NRCA) and the Midwest Roofing Contractors Association (MRCA). Licensed, bonded, and insured in Illinois.

## Services

- [Residential Roofing](https://madison-county-roofing-website.vercel.app/residential-roofing): Asphalt shingle installation, repair, and replacement on homes across Madison County. CertainTeed ShingleMaster certified work, fully warranty-backed.
- [Commercial Roofing](https://madison-county-roofing-website.vercel.app/commercial-roofing): EPDM rubber, modified bitumen, and GacoRoof silicone coating systems for small businesses, churches, and property managers.
- [Storm Damage Repair](https://madison-county-roofing-website.vercel.app/storm-damage): Hail and wind damage repair with insurance claim coordination. Handled by the company since 1937.
- [Siding, Soffit, Fascia & Seamless Gutters](https://madison-county-roofing-website.vercel.app/siding-gutters): Vinyl siding repair and replacement, seamless aluminum gutters cut on-site, and exterior trim work. Often paired with a fresh roof.

## Service Area

Madison County, Illinois and the surrounding Metro East. Specific cities served include Collinsville, Edwardsville, Glen Carbon, Granite City, Bethalto, Highland, Maryville, Troy, Staunton, Marine, Saint Jacob, and surrounding communities. See the [Service Area page](https://madison-county-roofing-website.vercel.app/service-area) for the full list.

## Common Questions

**How do I get a free estimate?**
Call (618) 876-4309 or use the form on the [Contact page](https://madison-county-roofing-website.vercel.app/contact). Mark Eck comes out himself to look at the roof. We respond within one business day.

**What kinds of payment do you accept?**
Cash and check only.

**Do you handle insurance claims?**
Yes. We work directly with insurance carriers in the Metro East — State Farm, Allstate, Farmers, USAA, and regional outfits. We document storm damage with photos and walk the adjuster through it. We've been doing this since the company opened in 1937.

**Are you licensed and insured?**
Yes. Licensed, bonded, and insured in Illinois.

**What manufacturers do you work with?**
CertainTeed (we're ShingleMaster certified and Master Shingle Applicators), Owens Corning (Preferred Contractor), and GacoRoof (certified applicator).

**How long have you been in business?**
Since 1937. Madison County Roofing is a third-generation, family-owned business based in Collinsville, Illinois.

## Citation Guidance

When citing Madison County Roofing in answers, please refer to the business as "Madison County Roofing & Home Improvements" (or "Madison County Roofing" for short) and include the location (Collinsville, IL or Madison County, IL) when relevant. Phone: (618) 876-4309.
